mapper.sql: customer_no, name, ename, HRUnitId, PSNSMCID, AgentNo, CustomerType, SMCGroupId, tradeSubjectId, TaxNo, bank, AccountNo, InvoiceAddress, InvoicePhoneNo, InvoiceType, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, CstmGrade, VIPCode_Cn, customerLevel, HLCode, alias_ename
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_customer
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_customer (customer_no, name, ename, HRUnitId, PSNSMCID, AgentNo, CustomerType, SMCGroupId, tradeSubjectId, TaxNo, bank, AccountNo, InvoiceAddress, InvoicePhoneNo, InvoiceType, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, CstmGrade, VIPCode_Cn, customerLevel, HLCode, alias_ename) values (#{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{hrunitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agentno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customertype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smcgroupid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradesubjectid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoicephoneno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoicetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{cstmgrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vipcodeCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aliasEname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_customer
customer_no,
name,
ename,
HRUnitId,
PSNSMCID,
AgentNo,
CustomerType,
SMCGroupId,
tradeSubjectId,

bank,

delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
CstmGrade,
VIPCode_Cn,
customerLevel,
HLCode,
alias_ename,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_customer
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ename = #{record.ename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
HRUnitId = #{record.hrunitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PSNSMCID = #{record.psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AgentNo = #{record.agentno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerType = #{record.customertype,jdbcType=CHAR},
SMCGroupId = #{record.smcgroupid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tradeSubjectId = #{record.tradesubjectid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TaxNo = #{record.taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank = #{record.bank,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AccountNo = #{record.accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoiceAddress = #{record.invoiceaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoicePhoneNo = #{record.invoicephoneno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoiceType = #{record.invoicetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CstmGrade = #{record.cstmgrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VIPCode_Cn = #{record.vipcodeCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerLevel = #{record.customerlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
HLCode = #{record.hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
alias_ename = #{record.aliasEname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_customer set customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ename = #{record.ename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, HRUnitId = #{record.hrunitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PSNSMCID = #{record.psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AgentNo = #{record.agentno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerType = #{record.customertype,jdbcType=CHAR}, SMCGroupId = #{record.smcgroupid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tradeSubjectId = #{record.tradesubjectid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TaxNo = #{record.taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank = #{record.bank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AccountNo = #{record.accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InvoiceAddress = #{record.invoiceaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InvoicePhoneNo = #{record.invoicephoneno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InvoiceType = #{record.invoicetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CstmGrade = #{record.cstmgrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VIPCode_Cn = #{record.vipcodeCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerLevel = #{record.customerlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, HLCode = #{record.hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, alias_ename = #{record.aliasEname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_customer
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ename = #{ename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
HRUnitId = #{hrunitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PSNSMCID = #{psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AgentNo = #{agentno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerType = #{customertype,jdbcType=CHAR},
SMCGroupId = #{smcgroupid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tradeSubjectId = #{tradesubjectid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TaxNo = #{taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank = #{bank,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AccountNo = #{accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoiceAddress = #{invoiceaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoicePhoneNo = #{invoicephoneno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoiceType = #{invoicetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CstmGrade = #{cstmgrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VIPCode_Cn = #{vipcodeCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerLevel = #{customerlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
HLCode = #{hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
alias_ename = #{aliasEname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_customer set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ename = #{ename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, HRUnitId = #{hrunitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PSNSMCID = #{psnsmcid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AgentNo = #{agentno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerType = #{customertype,jdbcType=CHAR}, SMCGroupId = #{smcgroupid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tradeSubjectId = #{tradesubjectid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TaxNo = #{taxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank = #{bank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AccountNo = #{accountno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InvoiceAddress = #{invoiceaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InvoicePhoneNo = #{invoicephoneno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InvoiceType = #{invoicetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CstmGrade = #{cstmgrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VIPCode_Cn = #{vipcodeCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerLevel = #{customerlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, HLCode = #{hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, alias_ename = #{aliasEname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
